results.question: What quality metrics does AutoRAG EvalOps evaluate before deployment?
results.expected_answer: AutoRAG EvalOps evaluates retrieval accuracy, citation coverage, grounding quality, unsupported claims, and latency.
results.generated_answer: AutoRAG EvalOps evaluates retrieval accuracy, citation coverage, grounding quality, unsupported claims, and latency [S1].

results.question: What happens when RAG quality drops below the required threshold?
results.expected_answer: The deployment can fail when RAG quality drops below the required threshold.
results.generated_answer: If the platform is connected to CI/CD pipelines, deployment can fail when RAG quality drops below the required threshold [S1].

results.question: What can developers do inside AutoRAG EvalOps?
results.expected_answer: Developers can upload documents, create evaluation test cases, run RAG evaluations, and compare prompt versions.
results.generated_answer: Inside AutoRAG EvalOps, developers can upload documents, create evaluation test cases, run RAG evaluations, and compare prompt versions [S1]. They can also connect the platform to CI/CD pipelines to ensure deployment fails if RAG quality drops below a required threshold [S1].
